_howto: Add new items to the TOP of the list; the page shows the newest 4.
TEXT-LINK ITEM: {date, text, url}. Get url from the post's ... menu > 'Copy link to post'.

EMBEDDED ITEM: add an 'embed' field. On the post: ... menu > 'Embed this post' > copy the code, then paste EITHER the iframe's src URL (starts with https://www.linkedin.com/embed/) OR just the urn:li:share:... / urn:li:activity:... part. Optional 'height' (default 400). Only public posts can be embedded.
Keep 'url' and 'text' on embedded items too — they become the fallback link if LinkedIn blocks the iframe for a visitor.

items.text: #Urunana: Hand in hand, we shall build the African AI that solves African problems
items.embed: <iframe src="https://www.linkedin.com/embed/feed/update/urn:li:ugcPost:7366144138452291587?collapsed=1" height="628" width="504" frameborder="0" allowfullscreen="" title="Embedded post"></iframe>

items.text: Led AI governance sessions for 70 policymakers from 22 African nations at the OpenSchool Initiative.
Invited talk at the US Holocaust Memorial Museum, Washington DC, on the SpaceTimeNarratives testimony pipeline.
